title: Dirty Plugin Partial Install
objective: A disposable user state with a plugin install record whose files are missing, used to prove OpenClaw reports partial installs clearly and keeps gateway, doctor, and rollback paths usable.

setup.title: Write Dirty Plugin Partial Install
setup.intent: Write a plugin install record that points to missing plugin files inside the disposable env.
commands: ocm env exec {env} -- node {kovaRoot}/support/dirty-plugin-state.mjs prepare dirty-plugin-partial-install

setup.title: Verify Dirty Plugin Partial Install
setup.intent: Verify OpenClaw did not silently recreate or erase the partial install evidence while handling dirty plugin state.
commands: ocm env exec {env} -- node {kovaRoot}/support/dirty-plugin-state.mjs verify dirty-plugin-partial-install

cleanupGuarantees: disposable env cleanup removes dirty plugin fixture files

source.note: plugin install record without plugin files
